channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260313.1)
item.description:
What's New

feat: add auto-check for updates toggle in Appearance settings

  • Add autoCheckForUpdates property to Preferences model (default: true)
  • Add SharedSettings key, accessor with default-true logic, load/save support
  • Update AppDelegate to sync Sparkle updater.automaticallyChecksForUpdates
  • Add toggle in Appearance > Khởi động section
  • Manual check for updates remains available regardless of toggle state
  • Bump version to 1.2.21 (20260313.1)

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
